prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge, warm wood interior. Yuna Brightford, a masculine quartermaster in a neat vest and guild sash, stands at a workbench holding a shield steady. Yuna Silverbrook, an androgynous guild coordinator in a formal cloak, stands beside them, carefully guiding a safe repair tool along the shield's edge. Warm forge light, cooperative teamwork, clear body language, no text, no watermark, anime fantasy style.

Same continuous forge shot, consistent lighting and characters. Yuna Silverbrook taps the final harmless repair mark on the shield while Yuna Brightford maintains a steady grip. Friendly interaction, clear tool motion, warm atmosphere, no text, no watermark, high-quality anime fantasy RPG aesthetic.
